title: YTP: The Link and King Show in Captain King
description:
Episode 6: After watching "The Mask" out of boredom, the King decides to become a Superhero with the use of the Triforce of Power. The show is filmed in front of a live studio audience.

Special Thanks to TomMoore9000, winner of the Idea Contest!!
